request.description: Tạo tài khoản Doctor #2 (để chat tư vấn)
Verify Doctor #1 - Giờ có thể tạo sessions
Verify Doctor #2 - Giờ có thể chat tư vấn

exec: console.log("🔐 Tất cả tokens đã saved vào environment");

request.description: Register new user (patient, doctor, or admin)
Login with email and password. Returns JWT token
Get paginated list of all users (ADMIN only)
Get list of verified doctors with optional filtering
Get user by ID (Admin or own profile)
Delete user account (Admin or own account)
Create new patient profile (no additional fields needed - only uses userId from auth)
Get paginated list of all patients (ADMIN only)
Update current patient's profile (read-only in template - no fields can be updated)
Get paginated list of all admins (SUPER_ADMIN only)
Create new notification. Types: info, success, warning, critical
Get paginated list of user's notifications
Get notification detail (auto marks as read)
Mark all user notifications as read
Send new message to another user
Get conversation history with specific user
Mark all messages in conversation as read
Get sessions with filters and pagination
Get upcoming sessions for next N days
Get average rating and stats for specific doctor
Get all reviews for specific doctor
Get health metrics with filters and pagination
Get statistics for specific metric type
Get health alerts based on metrics
Get list of pending doctor approvals
Start new AI session (patient_id auto from auth)
Report user violation (harassment, spam, misinformation, etc.)
Get violations for specific user (reported by or against)
